name: Move Out Manor
short_description: Gig work is rough...but gig work in the netherworld is a nightmare! "Move Out Manor" is an intense block-pushing game set in a cursed mansion. Rid the manor of the owner's occult items and close the portal to the underworld.
detailed_description:
"Move Out Manor" is an intense block-pushing game set in a cursed mansion. Rid the manor of the owner's occult items and close the portal to the underworld.

Aleister recently started doing gig jobs around town. After all the tasks he'd managed to accomplish, helping someone move out seemed like a piece of cake.

However, Aleister would soon discover that while gig work is rough...gig work in the netherworld is a nightmare!

Push and Pack

Pack up the cursed items in the house into moving boxes by pushing them onto paranormal packing devices.

Ship out the cursed boxes by pushing them onto the conveyor belt that the moving company conveniently set up throughout the house beforehand.

Cursed items and boxes glow with a mysterious green flame.

Watch Out

Ghosts and ghouls are in every room to stop you. Make sure to avoid them or you may be trapped...forever.

Story

The previous occupant of the big house on the hill known as The Manor had some strange hobbies. Since he stopped paying his mortgage and his whereabouts are unknown, the bank repossessed the house. Nigel’s Moving Services was assigned the task. Since it was a big job, Nigel decided to put out some ads for a few more hands.

Clad in blue coveralls, Aleister walked through the front door of The Manor. After packing a few items, he noticed something peculiar. He was able to make one comment before being sucked up:

“What’s this strange swirling Vor-TEXXXX?!?”

Will Aleister make it out of The Manor in time? Only if he packs up and pushes out all the cursed items. Good thing speedrunning was in the job description!
